title: Bridge Essay: Adaptability, supernaturalness, and the neurocognitive basis of the self-transce

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Neurocognitive basis of self-transcendence trait — adaptability and supernaturalness as measurable cognitive tendencies with neural underpinnings

**Adaptability, supernaturalness, and the neurocognitive basis of the self-transcendence trait: Toward an integrated framework through disaster psychology and aself-agency model.**. Frontiers in behavioral neuroscience. (2022). PMID: 36062259. DOI: 10.3389/fnbeh.2022.943809
